translations.vi: Anh trai tôi là kỹ sư.

sentences.target: Ich suche einen Ingenieur für das Projekt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪnən ɪnɡeˈnʝøːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ das pʁoˈjɛkt/

translations.de: Ich suche einen Ingenieur für das Projekt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪnən ɪnɡeˈnʝøːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ das pʁoˈjɛkt/
translations.en: I'm looking for an engineer for the project.
translations.es: Busco un ingeniero para el proyecto.
translations.fr: Je cherche un ingénieur pour le projet.
translations.it: Sto cercando un ingegnere per il progetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为这个项目找一位工程师。
translations.yue: 我為呢個項目搵一位工程師。
translations.pt: Estou procurando um engenheiro para o projeto.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một kỹ sư cho dự án.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een ingenieur voor het project.
translations.hi: मैं परियोजना के लिए एक इंजीनियर ढूँढ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω έναν μηχανικό για το πρότζεκτ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en ingeniør til prosjektet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari seorang insinyur untuk proyek ini.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en ingenjör till projektet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en ingeniør til projektet.
translations.ja: このプロジェクトのためにエンジニアを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb; 1st person singular present; transitive and selects an accusative direct object.
Indefinite article; masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Ingenieur' (direct object).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'suche'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a purpose/benefactive prepositional phrase.
Definite article; neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Projekt' (object of 'für').
Common noun; neuter accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Der Ingenieur erklärt mir den Plan.

translations.de: Der Ingenieur erklärt mir den Plan.
translations.en: The engineer explains the plan to me.
translations.es: El ingeniero me explica el plan.
translations.zh-Hans: 工程师向我解释这个计划。
translations.yue: 工程師向我解釋個計劃。
translations.pt: O engenheiro me explica o plano.
translations.vi: Kỹ sư giải thích kế hoạch cho tôi.
translations.nl: De ingenieur legt mij het plan uit.
translations.hu: A mérnök elmagyarázza nekem a tervet.
translations.hi: इंजीनियर मुझे योजना समझा रहा है।
translations.el: Ο μηχανικός μου εξηγεί το σχέδιο.
translations.ja: エンジニアが私に計画を説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; ditransitive, taking a dative recipient and an accusative theme.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Plan' (direct object).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'erklärt'.

sentences.target: Mein Vater arbeitet als Ingenieur in Berlin.
sentences.reading: /maɪn ˈfaːtɐ ˈaʁbaɪtət als ɪnɡeˈnʝøːɐ̯ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/

translations.de: Mein Vater arbeitet als Ingenieur in Berlin.
translations.ipa: /maɪn ˈfaːtɐ ˈaʁbaɪtət als ɪnɡeˈnʝøːɐ̯ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/
translations.en: My dad works as an engineer in Berlin.
translations.es: Mi papá trabaja como ingeniero en Berlín.
translations.fr: Mon père travaille comme ingénieur à Berlin.
translations.it: Mio padre lavora come ingegnere a Berlino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爸爸在柏林当工程师。
translations.yue: 我爸爸喺柏林做工程師。
translations.ru: Мой папа работает инженером в Берлине.
translations.pt: Meu pai trabalha como engenheiro em Berlim.
translations.vi: Bố tôi làm kỹ sư ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Mijn vader werkt als ingenieur in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Мій тато працює інженером у Берліні.
translations.hi: मेरे पापा बर्लिन में इंजीनियर के रूप में काम करते हैं।
translations.pl: Mój tata pracuje jako inżynier w Berlinie.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς μου δουλεύει ως μηχανικός στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Pappaen min jobber som ingeniør i Berlin.
translations.id: Ayah saya bekerja sebagai insinyur di Berlin.
translations.sv: Min pappa jobbar som ingenjör i Berlin.
translations.ro: Tata meu lucrează ca inginer în Berlin.
translations.cs: Můj táta pracuje jako inženýr v Berlíně.
translations.da: Min far arbejder som ingeniør i Berlin.
translations.ja: 父はベルリンでエンジニアとして働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; masculine nominative singular; determiner of 'Vater' (subject).
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive.
Preposition/complementizer introducing a role/predicative noun; links 'arbeiten' with a role designation.
Predicate noun after 'als'; typically articleless role designation (conventionally nominative).
Two-way preposition; here with static/locative meaning and dative case.
Proper noun; place name; object of 'in' (locative complement).
